Title: Exclusive 5.5-Room Gallery Penthouse with Fireplace and Greenery Views
Remarks:
Located in a quiet area of Zurich-Affoltern, this exceptional 5.5-room attic gallery apartment offers charm, generous living space, and immediate access to nature.

The apartment impresses with its distinctive maisonette layout, high sloping ceilings with exposed wooden elements, and an impressive living area featuring a gallery and a fireplace. The spacious floor plan creates a bright and open living environment and offers a variety of possibilities for families, couples, flat-sharing communities or those working from home.

Approximately 167 m² of usable space includes a generous living and dining area, three bedrooms on the lower level, an open gallery with a separate room, a kitchen, a bathroom with bathtub/WC, and an additional bathroom with shower/WC. Large windows and skylights provide abundant natural light throughout the apartment.

A particular highlight is the sunny balcony with unobstructed views of the surrounding greenery. Adjacent meadows, forests, and recreational areas create a natural and peaceful atmosphere, while shopping facilities, schools, daycare centers, and public transportation are all within easy walking distance.

Apartment Highlights

5.5-room attic gallery apartment with maisonette character on the 2nd floor
Approx. 167 m² usable area
Spacious living space with fireplace
Open gallery suitable as a home office, reading corner, or hobby area
Sunny balcony overlooking green surroundings
Spacious rooms on two levels
Renovated kitchen with induction hob, oven, dishwasher, and fridge
Two bathrooms (bathtub/WC and shower/WC)
Parquet flooring in the living areas
Private basement storage room
Private wash machine and dryer in the basement
Pets are welcome
Quiet, family-friendly location within the City of Zurich (Zone 110), surrounded by forests, farms, and protected natural areas
SBB railway station, post office, and shopping facilities (Migros, Denner, Coop) within a few minutes' walk
Schools and daycare centers located within the neighborhood and easily reachable on foot
Zurich city center and Oerlikon can be reached within approximately 10 minutes by car or conveniently by public transportation (bus lines 62 and 61, S-Bahn line S6, and trolleybus line 32)
Immediate proximity to ETH Zurich Hönggerberg campus (bus lines 80, 37, and 42)
Close to popular recreational areas including Chatzensee and Käferberg forest
The apartment is situated in a well-maintained residential neighborhood in Zurich-Affoltern. The combination of living close to nature, excellent infrastructure, and quick access to Oerlikon, Zurich Airport, and Zurich city center makes this apartment an ideal home for those who value space, tranquility, and quality of life.

Please note that the building does not have an elevator.

Optional: One or two underground parking spaces available, each for CHF 135 per month.
